qa_pairs.question: Which superheroes named Big Barda weigh at most 135.0 kilograms?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
WHERE superhero.weight_kg <= 135.0 AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Big Barda'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which superhero entities with weight kg at most '135.0' and superhero name equal to 'Big Barda'?

JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE race.race = 'Human' AND alignment.alignment = 'Bad' AND colour.colour = 'No Colour' AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Bird-Man II'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which superhero entities with superhero name equal to 'Bird-Man II', having at least one related alignment record (linked on superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id) with alignment equal to 'Bad', having at least one related colour record (linked on superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id and superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id and superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id) with colour equal to 'No Colour', having at least one related race record (linked on superhero.race_id = race.id) with race equal to 'Human'?

JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
